headline: Matlantis Accelerates Materials Discovery with NVIDIA ALCHEMI Toolkit
summary: New integration enables high-throughput materials simulation at industrial scaleCAMBRIDGE, Mass and TOKYO, April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Matlantis today announced the integration of the NVIDIA ALCHEMI Toolkit into its platform to deliver unprecedented computational throughput for industrial materials simulation. This new milestone builds on a strong foundation of technical collaboration and synergy between the two companies. Matlantis has previously integrated NVIDIA Warp-optimized kernels
